meaning: n.农业工人,乡下人,粗野的人,吝啬鬼
examples: Churlish: like, or befitting a churl; boorish or vulgar.
He must have had some upsdowns in life to make him such a churl.
He must have had some ups and downs in life to make him such a churl.
Lee Ki-Churl, a corporation official, said he expected Tanzanians to benefit from the deal.
